description: You are a real estate agent's media coordinator. Create a property listing video using the 8 photos in /home/ga/Pictures/property_tour/ (room_01.jpg through room_08.jpg) and the voiceover at /home/ga/Music/property_narration.wav, adhering to the specifications in /home/ga/Documents/listing_video_spec.txt. The video must feature the photos in sequence for 4 seconds each (32s total) with crossfade transitions, fade-in/fade-out effects, and the overlaid audio. Export the following deliverables to /home/ga/Videos/listing_output/: a 1920x1080 master, a 1280x720 mobile version, a 1080x1080 square version, a 640x360 email version (under 8MB), and a 400x300 thumbnail. Additionally, generate a manifest.json file detailing the properties of all exported files.
